title: Synotis yakoensis

It belongs to the genus Synotis, which is a group of shrubs and herbaceous plants native to tropical Africa. Synotis yakoensis is further categorized as a species within the genus, indicating its unique characteristics and genetic makeup. The classification of Synotis yakoensis reflects its evolutionary relationships and adaptations to its environment.
